introSection: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funtown Pier in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. This Wild Mouse opened with the park in 1957.
fullText: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funtown Pier in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. This Wild Mouse opened with the park in 1957.
